title: Minister Response: COSEWIC species at risk assessments - November 2022 - Canada.ca
content:
## Minister Response: COSEWIC species at risk assessments - November 2022
Official title: The Minister of the Environment's Response to Species at Risk Assessments submitted by COSEWIC on November 2, 2022
